titleStmt.title: SII 34.358: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 358. Kunnāṇḍārkōyil, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the rock-cut cave in the Parvatagirīśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Jaṭāvarman Parākrama-pāṇḍya, 9th year, badi 6, Wednesday, Rōhiṇi = A.D. 1323.
This records the sale of land to Vyāpakaśiva referred to in 352 above, by a Paṉaṅgāṭṭu-nāḍāḻvāṉ a uḍaiyāṉ of Perumpuliyūr in Teṉmalai-nāḍu of Vaḍa-Paṉaṅgāḍu-nāḍu a unit of Jayasiṅgakulakāla-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kōṟcaṭapaṉmar tirupuvaṉaccakkaravatti parākramapā
ṇṭiya tēvarkku yāṇṭu 9 tu Aparapakṣattu ṣaṣṭhiyum puta
n kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa rōcaṇi nāḷ ceyaciṅkakulakā
la vaḷanāṭṭu vaṭapaṉaṅkāṭṭu nāṭṭu teṉmalai nāṭṭu
perumpuliyūruṭaiyāṉ poṉṉaṉ paṉaṅkāṭṭu nāṭā
ḻvāṉēṉ tiruvāṉaikkā tiruppatiyil naṭuvil maṭat
tu mutaliyār śiśyakaḷil viyāpakacivaṟku nilavilai prāmā
ṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu taṭam paṇṭalil Eṉkāṇi Āy vi
vittal taṭi kku Ellai Āvatu kīḻpāṟkellai vattāṇiyār ce
ykku mēṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kalaiyāṭam ceykku vaṭakkum
mēlpāṟkellai kāṭṭukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai koḷakaṉā
kūr kuṭikkāṭṭukku teṟkum Āka Icainta Iṉṉāṉ kellaikku
Uṭpaṭṭa 2kkum puṉceykkum viṟṟukkuṭuttu koḷvatāṉa
taṉāl paṇam Irupatum paṟṟi viṟṟukkuṭuttēṉ viyāpakacivaṟku
paṉaṅkāṭṭu nāṭāḻvāṉēṉ Ippaṭikku vittāṇṭāṉ kuṉṟaṉ
cōḻakaṅka tēvaṉ taṟkkuṟikkum poṉṉaṉ vittāṇṭāṉ taṟkuṟikkum
Inta pramāṇam Eḻutiṉēṉ Iṉ(ṉā)nāṭṭukkaṇakku nāluruṭaiya
yāṉ kuṉṟaṉ malaipperumāḷ teṉmalaināṭṭu vēḷāṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 34.358 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
